arts.ttl: England prepare for Republic of Ireland in Carsley’s final game
arts.sum: Hear from Harry Kane and Lee Carsley ahead of England vs Republic of Ireland at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Ireland primed for London battle as pressure on England
arts.sum: "Of course, we know what kind of threat England gives us and if we are not ready from the first minute, they will punish us," said Hallgrimsson, when asked how vital it was that his team are immediately comfortable, both tactically and in formation. "We go like all our games to try to win, but it is of course a little relief knowing we’re not playing for a position, so I think the pressure on England in this game, they need to win game to win the group.

arts.ttl: Heimir Hallgrimsson: England want to win World Cup, Ireland just to get there
arts.sum: The two sides meet in the Nations League at Wembley on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane makes worried England admission after ‘surprise’ at big-name dropout row
arts.sum: Harry Kane has taken aim at some of his England teammates choosing not to join up with the current Three Lions squad for clashes against Greece and the Republic of Ireland

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford sends message to new Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim after latest England snub
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has started all but one of Manchester United's Premier League games this season but hasn't shown his best form - though he'll be eager to show new boss Ruben Amorim he deserves a spot in his line-up

arts.ttl: England v Republic of Ireland: All you need to know
arts.sum: Thursday's win over Finland means it's the Nordic nation that are automatically relegated to League C, while Ireland also cannot finish higher than third which ensures that a promotion/relegation play-off awaits against a runner-up from one of the League C groups under the new format brought in for this edition. Ireland's openness stemmed partly from being over-run in midfield as Hallgrimsson named what on paper was a bold 4-4-2 shape which left central midfield Jason Knight and Josh Cullen with a lot of space to cover and bodies to mark.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley focused on England ‘getting job done’ in final match against Ireland
arts.sum: England can seal top spot in their Nations League group with victory over the Republic of Ireland on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund handed another injury blow as Jamie Gittens doesn’t travel with England
arts.sum: Jamie Gittens (21) has played in every game for Borussia Dortmund this season, but the Englishman hasn’t travelled with the national team after sustaining an injury. As reported by Ruhr…

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham insists Rangers have no equal as 20 global superstars bathe in the Blue Sea of Ibrox
arts.sum: Some opposition players loved the old stadium so much they returned to play for the Gers.

arts.ttl: ‘I feel like I’m at the peak of my game’ says Harry Kane ahead of England clash
arts.sum: The England captain was left out of Thursday’s 3-0 Nations League win over Greece.
